final:
// // This T-flip-flop toggles its output (Q) when the T input is low on the falling edge of the clock. If T is high, the output should remain the same.
module t_flip_flop (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // toggle Q
        end
    end
endmodule
